name: paralog_family_olfactory
description: Olfactory receptor (OR) gene clusters: the largest gene superfamily in the human genome with ~400 functional 7TM receptors plus ~600 OR pseudogenes distributed across 50+ clusters on all chromosomes except 20 and Y. Largest clusters on chr11 (chr11q11-q13, chr11p15) and chr1q44. Cluster members share 40-99% identity; within-cluster paralogs typically 60-90%. Most ORs are encoded by a single coding exon of ~1 kb. Population copy-number variation is extensive.
